parsed_review.summary: CP00-569 is a clean descriptor-only pack covering RP18.P06.M02.S21-RP18.P06.M03.S08 (10 units, risk A), faithfully following the established RP18 pattern. Verified through Read/Grep/Glob only. Pack binding (registry.js:307-322), requirements (registry.js:1700-1741), contract projection (contracts/ai-legal-workflows-core-contract.json:20554-20762), validators, tests (test/model.test.js:1249-1298), and validator script are mutually consistent: pack_id, risk_class A, unit_count 10, range, next_subphase RP18.P06.M03.S09, deliverable distribution {test:2,security_audit:2,implementation:6}, and micro-title distribution {Type And Shape Definition:2, Primary Implementation Slice:8} all match the baseline. All 7 public exports exist and are wildcard re-exported via index.js (explaining its unmodified-but-referenced status). Since security_audit deliverables are present, summary-only review was prohibited and source was inspected directly: all 10 descriptor rows (including the 2 security_audit rows Permission matrix row + Audit hint fields and the 6 decision-binding implementation rows) are descriptor_only=true, runtime_execution=false, customer_safe_errors_only=true, raw_payload_included=false. The no-write attestation expands to all-false runtime/write/leak/exposure flags (no runtime permission evaluation, no audit-event write, no state write, no real data). command-evidence.json shows all 27 commands at exit 0 including the prompt-required gates; closeout-pack:validate is legitimately deferred as a post-review gated command. Readiness auth preflight passed (exit 0, valid JSON). Authority boundary preserved: claude_is_final_approval=false, local_validation_claims_enterprise_trust=false, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening=true; Hermes appears only as deterministic evidence-packet strings (emits_hermes_runtime_receipt=false), not product runtime. production_ready=false and runtime_ready=false are honestly set — the production_ready_flag is a descriptor-verification label, not a runtime claim. The 3 post-review artifacts (claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, construction-inspection.json) are correctly absent at this stage as they are produced by this review and downstream steps; no prior invalid attempts exist; unrelated dirty UI files are correctly excluded from pack scope. No P0/P1/P2/P3 findings.
